'''vadungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mia|mia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-d-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mia|mia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vadungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vædingith|vædingith]] || [[word:vædingij|vædingij]] || [[word:vædingish|vædingish]] || [[word:vædingi|vædingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vadudunguth|vadudunguth]] || [[word:vadudunguj|vadudunguj]] || [[word:vadudungush|vadudungush]] || [[word:vadudungu|vadudungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vadunguth|vadunguth]] || [[word:vadunguj|vadunguj]] || [[word:vadungush|vadungush]] || [[word:vadungu|vadungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vadufngufth|vadufngufth]] || [[word:vadufngufj|vadufngufj]] || [[word:vadufngufsh|vadufngufsh]] || [[word:vadufnguf|vadufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vadunguthu|vadunguthu]] || [[word:vadunguju|vadunguju]] || [[word:vadungushu|vadungushu]] || [[word:vadunguku|vadunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vadunguth|vadunguth]] || [[word:vadunguj|vadunguj]] || [[word:vadungush|vadungush]] || [[word:vadungu|vadungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vadunguthul|vadunguthul]] || [[word:vadungujul|vadungujul]] || [[word:vadungushul|vadungushul]] || [[word:vadungukul|vadungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vadunguuthuthu|vadunguuthuthu]] || [[word:vadunguujuju|vadunguujuju]] || [[word:vadunguushushu|vadunguushushu]] || [[word:vadunguuku|vadunguuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vadunguthun|vadunguthun]] || [[word:vadungujun|vadungujun]] || [[word:vadungushun|vadungushun]] || [[word:vadungukun|vadungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vadunguthuoro|vadunguthuoro]] || [[word:vadungujuoro|vadungujuoro]] || [[word:vadungushuoro|vadungushuoro]] || [[word:vadungukuoro|vadungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|34122d8}}
